prompt:
create a full marketing launch campaign for lumina. it's a new smart desk lamp that adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting. $149 retail, target audience is remote workers 25-40

here's what i need, each one as its own file:

1. tagline.txt - memorable brand tagline (one line plz)
2. hero-copy.txt - hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. email-sequence.txt - 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. social-posts.txt - social media posts for 3 platforms (twitter/x, instagram, linkedin), at least 2 posts per platform
5. landing-page.txt - full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, faq section with at least 5 questions, cta)
6. press-release.txt - press release announcing the product launch (proper pr format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

make sense? the copy should be compelling and on-brand

okay thats it. actually do the work, don't just yap about it. write everything to the files

result.content:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features

args.content: Light that works as hard as you do.

Headline: Meet Lumina — the smart desk lamp that tunes itself to your day.

Paragraph 1: Morning focus, afternoon meetings, late-night wrap‑ups — your light should keep up. Lumina automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, your calendar events, and the room’s ambient light so you always have the right glow without lifting a finger.

Paragraph 2: Designed for remote workers who care about comfort and productivity, Lumina helps reduce eye strain, keeps you energized, and makes your workspace feel effortlessly refined. It just works — so you can, too.

Paragraph 3: For $149, get lighting that adapts to how you actually work. Plug it in, connect your calendar, and let Lumina do the rest.

Email 1: Teaser
Subject: Your desk lighting is about to get smarter

Hi there,

Remote work has changed everything — except the way most desk lamps still make you adjust settings all day long.

We’re about to introduce something better. Lumina is a smart desk lamp that automatically adapts its brightness and color temperature to your time of day, your calendar, and the light in your room. No more eye strain. No more fiddling with controls.

Launch is coming soon. Stay tuned — your desk is about to feel a lot better.

— Team Lumina


Email 2: Launch
Subject: Lumina is here — light that adapts to your life

Hi there,

Meet Lumina, the smart desk lamp built for remote workers. Lumina adjusts lighting throughout the day to keep you focused in the morning, comfortable in the afternoon, and relaxed into the evening — all automatically.

Why you’ll love it:
- Adapts to time of day, calendar events, and ambient light
- Reduces eye strain without harsh glare
- Sleek design that elevates any workspace

Lumina is available now for $149. Light that works as hard as you do.

Shop Lumina →

— Team Lumina


Email 3: Follow‑up
Subject: Still adjusting your desk lamp by hand?

Hi there,

If you’re still toggling brightness and warmth all day, Lumina was made for you. It learns your routine and optimizes your lighting automatically — whether you’re deep in focus or on back‑to‑back video calls.

Set it once, then forget it. That’s the “it just works” experience your workspace deserves.

Grab Lumina for $149 and upgrade your daily workflow.

Get Lumina →

— Team Lumina

Twitter/X
1) Meet Lumina — the smart desk lamp that adjusts brightness + color temp based on time of day, your calendar, and ambient light. No more eye strain, no more manual tweaks. $149. #remotework #productivity
2) Your desk lighting should keep up with your day. Lumina does the adjusting for you — focus in the morning, calm in the evening. Light that just works. ✨

Instagram
1) A lamp that knows your schedule. 🌅💻 Lumina auto‑tunes your workspace light for focus, meetings, and wind‑down — all without lifting a finger. $149. #homeoffice #remotework
2) Say goodbye to harsh glare and constant adjustments. Lumina adapts to time of day + ambient light for a workspace that feels effortless. #workspace #wellness

LinkedIn
1) Remote work deserves smarter lighting. Lumina is a desk lamp that automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and room light — helping teams stay focused and comfortable. Available now for $149.
2) Introducing Lumina: light that adapts to how you actually work. Designed for remote professionals who want less eye strain and more flow. Smart, simple, and ready for your desk.

HERO
Headline: Light that adapts to your life.
Subhead: Lumina is the smart desk lamp for remote workers — automatically adjusting brightness and color temperature based on time of day, your calendar, and ambient room light.
Primary CTA: Get Lumina for $149
Secondary CTA: See how it works

FEATURES
1) Automatic all‑day tuning
Lumina shifts from crisp, energizing light in the morning to warmer tones at night, no manual adjustments needed.

2) Calendar‑aware lighting
Heading into a meeting? Lumina subtly brightens and cools to keep you alert on video calls.

3) Ambient‑light intelligence
Sensors read your room’s light and compensate instantly for consistent, comfortable illumination.

4) Eye‑strain reduction
Balanced, glare‑free light helps you stay focused longer — and feel better doing it.

5) Designed for modern workspaces
Minimal, elegant form factor that elevates any desk setup.

TESTIMONIALS
“[Testimonial placeholder: Real user quote about comfort and focus.]”
“[Testimonial placeholder: Real user quote about automatic adjustments.]”

FAQ
1) How does Lumina know when to change settings?
Lumina uses time of day, your connected calendar, and ambient‑light sensors to select the optimal brightness and color temperature.

2) Do I have to adjust it manually?
No. You can set preferences once, and Lumina handles the rest automatically.

3) Which calendars are supported?
Lumina supports major calendar services and syncs securely so it can optimize lighting around your meetings.

4) Will it work in bright rooms or low light?
Yes. Lumina continuously measures ambient light and adjusts to keep your workspace comfortable.

5) What’s included for $149?
The Lumina lamp, power adapter, quick‑start guide, and access to the Lumina app.

6) Can I still customize the lighting?
Absolutely. Use the app to fine‑tune settings or create manual modes anytime.

CTA
Ready to stop adjusting your lamp all day?
Get Lumina for $149 →

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp That Adapts to Your Workday
New $149 lamp automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time, calendar events, and room light

SAN FRANCISCO, CA — [Month Day, Year] — Lumina today announced the launch of its new smart desk lamp designed specifically for remote workers. Priced at $149, Lumina automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting to reduce eye strain and help users stay focused throughout the day.

“As work became more flexible, lighting didn’t,” said [Name], [Title] at Lumina. “We built Lumina to create the right light for every moment — morning focus, afternoon meetings, or evening wind‑down — without making people think about it. It just works.”

Unlike traditional desk lamps that require constant manual tweaks, Lumina intelligently adapts to the user’s environment and schedule. The lamp integrates with major calendar services and uses built‑in sensors to maintain comfortable, glare‑free illumination in any room.

Lumina is available now for $149 at [website].

About Lumina
Lumina creates smart lighting designed for how people actually work. Built for remote professionals, Lumina products deliver an “it just works” experience that reduces eye strain and elevates everyday workspaces.

Media Contact
[Name]
[Title]
[Email]
[Phone]
